title: Organize workout tracking by day of the week with daily exercise intervals

requirements.text: Modify the backend data model to associate each workout session with a specific day of the week (Monday through Sunday)

quotes: I need to enter the workout. Entirely in daily intervals. i.e.  Monday: Benchpress 3x8 , Deadlift 4x8 etc

acceptanceCriteria: Workout sessions store a day-of-week field in addition to existing date field
Day of week is represented as a string or enum (Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday)
Backend functions accept and return day-of-week data for workout sessions

requirements.text: Update the workout entry form to allow users to select or specify the day of the week when logging a workout

quotes: I need to enter the workout. Entirely in daily intervals. i.e.  Monday: Benchpress 3x8 , Deadlift 4x8 etc

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes a day-of-week selector (dropdown or button group)
Selected day is submitted along with exercise name, sets, reps, weight, duration, and notes
Form validation ensures a day is selected before submission

requirements.text: Reorganize the workout history view to group workout sessions by day of the week, displaying all exercises logged for each day together

quotes: I need to enter the workout. Entirely in daily intervals. i.e.  Monday: Benchpress 3x8 , Deadlift 4x8 etc

acceptanceCriteria: Workout history displays sections for each day of the week (Monday through Sunday)
Each day section lists all exercises logged for that day with their sets and reps (e.g., 'Benchpress 3x8', 'Deadlift 4x8')
Days with no workouts are either hidden or shown as empty
Exercises within each day are displayed in a clear, readable format

constraints: Maintain compatibility with existing workout session data structure
Do not modify Internet Identity integration or authentication hooks
nonGoals: Weekly workout scheduling or calendar view
Rest day tracking or recovery metrics
